notes.value: Custom endpoints stay gateway-only until a curated product profile exists.
MiniMax Anthropic-compatible endpoint supports the Claude lane only through a verified runtime profile, not a generic product SDK lane.
MiniMax OpenAI-compatible endpoint supports the Responses wire required by the Codex sidecar only through a verified runtime profile.

displayName.value: Google: Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview)
Google: Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview)
Google: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview Custom Tools

notes.value: Z.AI Anthropic-compatible endpoint supports the Claude lane only through a verified runtime profile; Z.AI OpenAI-compatible endpoints remain gateway-only because they are chat-completions only.
Z.AI OpenAI-compatible coding endpoint is chat-completions only; do not route it through the Codex sidecar.
Z.AI OpenAI-compatible general endpoint is chat-completions only; do not route it through the Codex sidecar.
